VAL-XA-001.evidence: End-to-end sweep->compare->JSON pipeline: sweep produced 5 configs, comparison had per_primitive and divergence_index, grid_data serialized with schema_version, round-trip file read matched

VAL-XA-002.evidence: River->eval->walk-forward pipeline: loaded 86400 1m bars from EURUSD Jan-Mar 2024, walk-forward produced 2 windows spanning Jan-Mar, verdict STABLE

VAL-XA-003.evidence: Phase 1 regression: 378 passed in 52.56s, exit code 0, zero failures

VAL-XA-004.evidence: Locked baseline equivalence: Phase 1 CascadeEngine=9784, Phase 2 EvaluationRunner=9784, all per-primitive per-TF counts match exactly

VAL-XA-005.evidence: Grid sweep determinism: two independent runs of FVG floor_threshold_pips sweep both produced grid [2480, 2480, 2480, 2480, 2480]

VAL-XA-006.evidence: Sweep comparison divergence: 9805 divergence_index entries, agreement_rate in [0,1] for all primitives/TFs, displacement showed expected variation (1m: rate=0.987, only_a=42, only_b=12)

VAL-XA-007.evidence: Walk-forward with River data: loaded 252000 bars (Jan-Aug 2024), produced 7 windows (>=6 required), verdict STABLE, all windows had non-null metrics
